Class StatementKit

java.lang.Object
recoder.kit.StatementKit
public class StatementKit extends Object

    Class
    Description
    static class 
    StatementKit.ControlFlowWalker
    This walker performs a depth first search and reports the reachable statements in the body of the given member.

  • Method Details

    • prepareStatementMutableList

      @Deprecated public static ASTList<Statement> prepareStatementMutableList(Statement s, ChangeHistory ch)
      Deprecated.
      replaced by first class transformation PrepareStatementList
      Transformation returning a mutable statement list that contains the given statement, and creating a new StatementBlockif necessary. It is necessary to create a new block, if getStatementMutableList(Statement)returns null. This is the case if the statement container allows only a single statement and the given statement is not inside a StatementBlock. If the statement has no parent, it is wrapped into a new statement list which then is returned.
      Parameters:
      s - a statement; may not be null.
      ch - the change history; may be null.
      Returns:
      the mutable statement list that the given statement is part of; the list is contained in a new StatementBlock if necessary.
      See Also:
      • getStatementMutableList(Statement)
      • wrapWithStatementBlock(Statement, ChangeHistory)

    • getStatementMutableList

      public static ASTList<Statement> getStatementMutableList(Statement s)
      Query returning a mutable statement list that contains the given statement, if there is such a list.
      • If the statement container already features a statement mutable list, this list is returned (e.g. Case).
      • If the statement container is a StatementBlock, its list is returned (except it is empty).
      • If the statement is the body of a LabeledStatement, the list for that labeled statement is returned instead.
      Parameters:
      s - a statement; may not be null.
      Returns:
      the mutable statement list that the given statement is part of, or null if there is none.

    • wrapWithStatementBlock

      @Deprecated public static StatementBlock wrapWithStatementBlock(Statement s, ChangeHistory ch)
      Deprecated.
      Transformation creating a new StatementBlock replacing the given statement and shifting it inside. If the statement has no parent, it is put into the new statement block and no changes are propagated. The new block is created even if the statement container already is a block. The new block is replacing the old statement with valid parent link. This transformation is safe if the statement is not an instance of LocalVariableDeclarationcontaining a variable that is actually referred.
      Parameters:
      s - a statement to be wrapped by a new statement block.
      ch - the change history; may be null.
      Returns:
      the new statement block replacing s.

    • canSafelyWrapWithStatementBlock

      @Deprecated public static boolean canSafelyWrapWithStatementBlock(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Statement s)
      Deprecated.
      Query deciding if the given single statement can be wrapped inside a block without changing program semantics. This is the case if the statement is not an instance of LocalVariableDeclarationcontaining a variable that is actually referred from outside.
      Parameters:
      xr - the cross referencer service used.
      s - a statement that might be wrapped.
      Returns:
      true if wrapping the statement in a block would not change the program semantics, false otherwise.

    • preparePrepend

      @Deprecated public static void preparePrepend(ChangeHistory ch, SourceInfo si, ExpressionJumpStatement returnOrThrow)
      Deprecated.
      will become a first class transformation
      Transformation that ensures that the given return or throw statement can be safely prepended by other statements. If the statement contains an expression that contains statements (side effects possible), the expression is replaced by a variable reference to a new temporary variable initialized by the former return value. If necessary, a new statement block is created wrapping the return or throw statement.
      Parameters:
      ch - the change history service (may be null).
      si - the source info service.
      returnOrThrow - a return or throw statement.

    • isReachable

      public static boolean isReachable(Statement s, SourceInfo si)
      Checks if the specified statement is reachable as defined in the static language semantics.
      Parameters:
      s - a statement.
      si - the SourceInfo service to use.
      Returns:
      true if the statement is reachable, false otherwise.
      Since:
      0.71

    • hasReachableEnd

      public static boolean hasReachableEnd(StatementBlock block, SourceInfo si)
      Checks if the end of the specified statement block is reachable as defined in the static language semantics.
      Parameters:
      block - a statement block.
      si - the SourceInfo service to use.
      Returns:
      true if the end of the block is reachable, false otherwise.
      Since:
      0.71

    • getCorrespondingLabel

      public static LabeledStatement getCorrespondingLabel(LabelJumpStatement s)
      Syntactic query locating the label addressed by the specified labeled break or continue statement.
      Parameters:
      s - a labeled jump statement.
      Returns:
      the corresponding labeled statement, or null if there is none.
      Since:
      0.71

    • getExits

      public static List<Statement> getExits(MemberDeclaration mdecl, SourceInfo si)
      For a method declaration or class initializer, returns a list of block exits, such as return or throw statements, and the body if its exit is reachable. For other members, returns an empty list.
      Parameters:
      mdecl - a member declaration.
      si - the SourceInfo service to use.
      Returns:
      a list of statements that finish the member's body after execution.
      Since:
      0.72
